source_context:
CV Assistant uses a three-layer dependency model: Skills depend on Powers and Models.

SKILLS (20 composable capabilities):

Vision Skills:
- SAM3 Segment Anything: requires SAM3 model weights (6.9 GB from HuggingFace), uses MLX Apple Silicon
- OCR · Text Extraction: uses PaddleOCR (pip, Apache 2.0, 80+ languages, auto-downloads)
- Object Detection: requires torchvision (BSD-3) + RT-DETR from transformers
- Object Tracking: requires supervision + ByteTrack/SORT (MIT)
- Text → Image Generation: requires diffusers + SD-Turbo/SDXL-Turbo model weights
- 2D Image Processing: ready (Pillow + OpenCV)
- 3D Image Processing: requires open3d
- Video Understanding: requires opencv + decord; unlocked by Vid-LLM power
- Image Stitching: requires opencv Stitcher
- Super Resolution: requires spandrel (ESRGAN, SwinIR, HAT)
- Image Denoising: requires kornia

Content Skills:
- Write Research Blog: ready (uses ArXiv + web_search tools)
- Weekly Digest: ready (auto-scheduled Monday)
- Email Reports: requires Email SMTP power configured

Research Skills:
- Paper → Spec: ready (fetch_arxiv_paper + extract_equations)
- Knowledge Graph: ready (Obsidian vault)
- Equation Extraction: ready
- Text → Diagram: requires paperbanana; uses Gemini API power or Ollama

ML / Training Skills:
- Model Fine-Tuning: ready with HF_TOKEN power; streams training via SSE
- Dataset Analysis: ready
- Kaggle Competition: requires Kaggle API power

POWERS (external integrations that unlock skills):
- HuggingFace Hub token → unlocks gated model downloads (SAM3, DeepGen 1.0)
- Google Gemini API key → unlocks Text→Diagram with Gemini image generation
- Email SMTP credentials → unlocks Email Reports skill
- Kaggle API key → unlocks Kaggle Competition skill and dataset search
- Brave Search API key → upgrades web search quality
- Semantic Scholar API key → removes rate limits on paper search
- GitHub token → enables GitHub repo access

MODELS (AI weights providing intelligence):
- SAM3 (facebook/sam3, 6.9 GB) → SAM3 segmentation skill
- SAM 2.1 Large (facebook/sam2.1-hiera-large, 2.5 GB) → segmentation
- SD-Turbo (stabilityai/sd-turbo, 4.8 GB) → Text→Image skill
- SDXL-Turbo (stabilityai/sdxl-turbo, 6.5 GB) → Text→Image skill
- DeepGen 1.0 (deepgenteam/DeepGen-1.0, 16.4 GB) → Text→Image skill
- PaddleOCR (pip package, 0.5 GB, auto-downloads) → OCR skill
- Ollama models (qwen2.5-coder, qwen3-vl) → all LLM/VLM reasoning
communicative_intent: Dependency map: how CV Assistant's 20 skills are unlocked by configuring Powers (API keys/integrations) and downloading Models (AI weights).
